title: microsorum thurnii
intro: Microsorum thurnii, also known as the Tongue Fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as skin infections and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Microsorum thurnii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be applied directly to the affected area or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
